name: Padded Ki Pushup
overview:
This mini-comic web-series showcases the life of a newly married man working as a lingerie salesman.

'Padded ki Pushup' is Hungama's first Marathi original show. A comedy, the story revolves around the life of Aditya, a newly married man who must balance his life as a lingerie salesman, while trying to hide the nature of his work from his wife and the prying eyes of his mother-in-law.
